THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MONTEROSSA, SHERYL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 225 HYDE STREET #509 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL NOV-02-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT IF ANY FORFEITED TO PLTF.

3:15 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF WHO WAS REPRESENTED BY ADAM BARISH, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR STEVEN E. LITTMAN, ESQ. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT SHERYL MONTEROSSA FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISE AT 225 HYDE STREET #509 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. LEASE FORFEITED. PLAINTIFF WAIVES PAST DUE RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO 2:00 P.M. ON 11/2/93. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ATTORNEY FEES AND COST. PLAINTIFF TO RETAIN DEFENDANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT. SUSAN H. MOSK, PRO TEM. SANDRA NAYLOR REPORTER.
